name: macos-icon-bars
description: Local Codex plugin for the macOS utility, menu bar, workflow, document, and creative skills in this repository.

interface.shortDescription: One Codex plugin that exposes this repo's macOS and workflow skills.
interface.longDescription: Adds the repository's bundled macOS utilities, menu bar ideas, clipboard flows, docs helpers, network tools, and creative workflow skills to Codex through one local plugin install.
